verse.name: v1
verse.lines: John could see the elders Gathered'round the Throne He saw a book in his right hand Closed and unknown It held the names and redemption claims Of every child of God If no one came to take this Book Creation would be lost

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Then suddenly an elder said, "There is a worthy One The Lion and the bloodly Lamb He prevailed and won He came and took this wondrous Book And He tore the seals away" And everyone bowed down and sang With voices filled with praise

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Let us worship For the Lion has prevailed The Book with our inheritance Has been opened and unveiled Hallelujah! Give Him glory Satan's plans have failed Because the Lion has prevailed

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: He has made us kings and priests And redeemed us by His grace. We shall rule and reign

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Let us worship For the Lion has prevailed The Book with our inheritance Has been opened and unveiled Hallelujah! Give Him glory Satan's plans have failed Because the Lion has prevailed The Lion has prevailed The Lion has prevailed Jesus has prevailed!
